## Summary

Describe the problem and the chosen solution.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] Tested as an unpacked extension
- [ ] First-use privacy consent and deletion controls tested when relevant
- [ ] Start/stop and master bypass tested
- [ ] Preset/state persistence tested
- [ ] No remote code, analytics, telemetry, advertising, microphone access, or new host permission
- [ ] New assets have verified redistribution rights and documented attribution

## Contributor agreement

- [ ] I have read and accept the [ArSonKuPik Contributor License Agreement](../CONTRIBUTOR_LICENSE_AGREEMENT.md), and I have authority to submit this contribution.

## Evidence

Add screenshots for interface changes and repeatable listening/test notes for DSP changes.
